content: Drizzle ORM is at v0.44.x (stable) with built-in Zod integration (drizzle-zod deprecated in favor of first-class schema generation in 1.0 beta). Works natively with Neon PostgreSQL via HTTP connections (edge-compatible). Integrates seamlessly with TanStack Start server functions. Type-safe schema, generated SQL migrations via drizzle-kit. Strong community adoption for TanStack Start stacks in 2025-2026.
